title: Something Legacy
description: A 1.12.2 modpack with great mods. Roleplay, build cities or fight it out with your friends. Enjoy
body:
**Something Legacy** is a feature-packed modpack for Minecraft 1.12.2 that blends technology, decoration, exploration, and creativity into one polished experience. Whether you're building futuristic machines or charming towns, there's a little something for everyone.

### Features
- Create stunning homes with **MrCrayfish’s Furniture**, **Macaw’s building mods**, **MalisisDoors**, and even **Jumping Castles**!
- Set up in-game computers and automation with **OpenComputers**, **CC: Tweaked**, and **Applied Energistics 2**
- Explore deep caves with **YUNG’s Better Caves**
- Roleplay with friends, build cities in survival, or wage high-tech battles thanks to **Hbm’s Nuclear Tech Mod Reloaded**
- Farm, decorate, and customize with dozens of quality-of-life and performance-enhancing mods—perfect for both solo and multiplayer play

### Release Timeline
- Originally released: August 3, 2021
- Re-released: July 15, 2025
- Released on Modrinth: October 17, 2025
